# Textarea

Styled textarea component built on the zw-textarea primitive.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/textarea</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/textarea
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Textarea } from '@zeus-web/textarea/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/textarea/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop               | Type      | Default | Description                                         |
| ------------------ | --------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `value`            | `string`  | -       | Controlled textarea value.                          |
| `defaultValue`     | `string`  | -       | Initial uncontrolled value.                         |
| `placeholder`      | `string`  | -       | Placeholder text.                                   |
| `rows`             | `number`  | -       | Native rows attribute.                              |
| `disabled`         | `boolean` | -       | Disables user interaction.                          |
| `ariaLabel`        | `string`  | -       | Accessible label for unlabeled textareas.           |
| `ariaDescribedby`  | `string`  | -       | ID reference for additional accessible description. |
| `ariaErrormessage` | `string`  | -       | ID reference for accessible error message.          |

## Events

| Event          | React prop      | Detail                                      | Description                              |
| -------------- | --------------- | ------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `value-change` | `onValueChange` | `value: string, nativeEvent: Event`         | Emitted when the textarea value changes. |
| `focus-change` | `onFocusChange` | `focused: boolean, nativeEvent: FocusEvent` | Emitted when focus state changes.        |

## Slots

| Slot      | Description                 |
| --------- | --------------------------- |
| `message` | Validation or help message. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `border-input`
- `ring-ring`
- `text-muted-foreground`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=textarea]`
- `[data-slot=textarea-message]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `textarea` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/textarea`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add textarea`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Textarea for multi-line text input.

Do not:

- Do not use Input for multi-line content.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea'

export function Example() {
  return <Textarea placeholder="Message" />
}
```
